title: schefflera biternata
intro: Schefflera biternata, also known as the Umbrella Tree, is a tropical plant species native to the island of New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schefflera biternata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
